_note: Post-championship PPI for teams whose drought predates their city's last big-four title. Computed season-by-season after the reset; used by ppi_cities.py.

Non-winning missed-playoff seasons (1991-2004, 2006-2008, 2010, 2016-2020, 2025) score 0 and are omitted; 2025 Bengals went 6-11 (losing record, no playoffs).

Miami Heat.window: NBA seasons strictly after 2025, through season-year 2026 (only 2025-26)
flags: 43-39 is a winning record but the Heat missed the playoffs (lost the play-in to Charlotte). Per CLAUDE.md the play-in tournament is not a playoff round, so this scores as winningRecordNoPlayoff (1), not firstRound (2).

seasons.detail: Finished 43-39 (10th in the Eastern Conference), a winning record. Qualified for the play-in tournament but lost to the Charlotte Hornets 127-126 in overtime, missing the playoffs for the first time since 2019. The play-in is not a playoff round (per PPI methodology), so a winning team eliminated in the play-in counts as winningRecordNoPlayoff, not firstRound.
